content:
Hi, this is a bit late since it's already the third of four days in total, but I was wondering if anyone here is attending the 38th Chaos Communication Congress in Hamburg? I talked to a few people at the Rust Assembly here already, but so far I haven't met anyone involved with Rust for Linux here.

Please let me know if anyone else is here, I'm also reachable at DECT 2576 at the event :)

Lukas Fischer said:

Hi, this is a bit late since it's already the third of four days in total, but I was wondering if anyone here is attending the 38th Chaos Communication Congress in Hamburg? I talked to a few people at the Rust Assembly here already, but so far I haven't met anyone involved with Rust for Linux here.

Please let me know if anyone else is here, I'm also reachable at DECT 2576 at the event :)

sorry, saw to late, only home 2 days ago from 38c3 :) (quite sure next year there as well, and also EH in hamburg and GPN in Karlsruhe if you should attend those events)

Fiona Behrens said:

sorry, saw to late, only home 2 days ago from 38c3 :) (quite sure next year there as well, and also EH in hamburg and GPN in Karlsruhe if you should attend those events)

Thanks for the heads up, I'll probably be there next year as well :) As for EH and GPN I don't know yet, so far I haven't planned it but I might join if it works out with my thesis.
Feel free to just directly ping me (hopefuylly I see pings, or also feel free to use matrix, or call me. usualy have 3356 as permanent extension in eventphone)
